meta_description: Learn about Habitat One — your partner for premium materials and design in Xàbia, Costa Blanca.
label: About Us
heading: Habitat One
hero_description: Your partner for premium materials, design consultation, and expert craftsmanship on the Costa Blanca.
story_heading: Everything under one roof for your dream home
story_text_1: At Habitat One, we bring together everything you need to realize your ideal home. Our experience center in Javea is designed as a complete one-stop shopping concept, where we fully unburden our customers – from purchase to completion and everything in between.
story_text_2: Whether you're looking for an existing property, a renovation project or a new development: with our partner Verhome Group, we guide you through the purchase of carefully selected properties. Often unique opportunities, including for example bank-owned properties, which we transform into high-quality homes fully tailored to your wishes.
story_text_3: Within Habitat One, you'll find all expertise under one roof. From architects and contractors to legal and administrative support, such as assistance with obtaining a NIE number. Additionally, we offer an extensive range of high-quality materials and finishes, directly sourced from Asia, Italy, Spain and other European countries. Think kitchens, bathrooms, flooring, fireplaces and sustainable installations such as heat pumps – all carefully selected for quality, design and price.
story_text_4: What sets us apart is the combination of reliable partners, craftsmanship and a fully integrated approach. You determine the style and end result, we handle the execution – efficient, transparent and with attention to detail.
story_text_5: Habitat One is more than a showroom. It's the place where ideas become reality and where your Spanish dream home is realized without worries.
value_quality_desc: We only work with trusted European manufacturers and personally select every product in our collection to ensure the highest standards.
value_personal_desc: Every project is unique. We take the time to understand your needs and provide tailored advice from concept to completion.
value_passion_desc: We live and breathe interior design and architecture. Our team stays ahead of trends to inspire and guide your choices.
value_local_desc: Based in Xàbia, we understand the local climate, building styles, and regulations. We're your trusted neighbour in every project.
cta_description: Visit our showroom in Xàbia or get in touch — we'd love to help bring your vision to life.
